# Fitapp Workspace Instructions

- Keep changes focused on the AI fitness SaaS in this workspace.
- Preserve dynamic calculations for BMI, BMR, TDEE, nutrition targets, plans, progress, hydration, and coaching.
- Do not introduce hardcoded nutrition values, workout templates, or recommendation text into production paths.
- Use Clerk for authentication, MongoDB/Mongoose for persistence, Gemini for AI generation, and Cloudinary for image storage.
- Keep the app responsive, mobile-first, and dark-mode friendly.
- Validate AI output before persisting it.
